name: Shrimp Noodle Bake
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Medium noodles, cooked and drained
1 can Condensed cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw shrimp if frozen.
2. Cut shrimp in half lengthwise, if desired.
3. Combine noodles, sour cream, soup, onions, olives, dill weed, seasoned salt, and half of the cheese; mix well.
4. Fold in shrimp.
5. Spoon into a shallow 2-quart baking dish.
6. Cover with aluminum foil, crimping it securely to edges of dish.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30 minutes.
8. Uncover, then sprinkle with remaining cheese.
9. Return to oven about 15 minutes or until cheese melts.
10. Makes 6 servings.
